intended_use: LARALAB is a software application that is intended to provide cardiologists, radiologists, heart surgeons and healthcare professionals additional information to aid them in reading and interpreting DI
intended_use_full: LARALAB is a software application that is intended to provide cardiologists, radiologists, heart surgeons and healthcare professionals additional information to aid them in reading and interpreting DICOM compliant medical images of structures of the heart and vessels. LARALAB enables the user to make: Visualizations, assessments and measurements (e.g. splines, distances, angulation, volumes) of structures of the heart and vessels, including such vascular structures relevant as access routes in the context of cardiovascular procedures.
target_condition: Cardiovascular structures requiring intervention or surgical assessment (aortic, mitral, tricuspid valve interventions; TAVR)
ground_truth: Expert clinician manual measurements obtained using the predicate device (3mensio Workstation)
other_metrics: Dice score: 0.89-0.98 for major structures (LA, LV, RV, RA); Mean Surface Distance (MSD) and 95th percentile Hausdorff distance (95% HD) reported; Bland-Altman analysis for measurement agreement within predefined acceptance criteria; Intraclass Correlation Coefficient (ICC) > 0.75 for all measurements
